UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile containing core identity and timestamps

uid.description: The unique Firebase Authentication user ID

displayName.description: Full name or nickname of the student

createdAt.description: Timestamp of the user record creation

FormulaBookmark.title: FormulaBookmark
FormulaBookmark.description: An electrical engineering equation saved by the student in their personalized notebook

id.description: The unique ID of the math equation

title.description: Name or title of the formula (e.g. Ohm's Law)

latex.description: The raw LaTeX string of the mathematical equation

userId.description: The student UID who bookmarked this formula

createdAt.description: Server timestamp of when it was saved

/users/{userId}.description: User profile mapping containing student academic settings

/users/{userId}/formulas/{formulaId}.description: Personalized math sheets containing student formulas synced from local storage
